summary: Hand-authored internal/azure package: DefaultAzureCredential + armappservice/armsubscriptions/azquery/armapplicationinsights SDK clients, replacing the generated REST client's static-token auth for Azure Resource Manager.
reason: Azure ARM requires a live Azure AD bearer token (DefaultAzureCredential), which the spec-derived static-token HTTP client cannot produce. Without this the CLI cannot authenticate to Azure at all.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood against a real subscription: 69 tests pass, 0 fail; auth via az session / SP both resolve.
